---
title: "Yicheng Shen"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:yshen128@jh.edu
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/sheny2
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yicheng-shen
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://x.com/YichengShen7
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: data/YichengShen_Academic_CV.pdf
resources:
  - "data/YichengShen_Academic_CV.pdf"
    # - icon: mortarboard
    #   text: Google Scholar
    #   href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ebjg6mUAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN&oi=sra
---

I am a Ph.D. candidate in Biostatistics at [Johns Hopkins University](https://publichealth.jhu.edu/departments/biostatistics/people/students/phd-student-profiles), jointly advised by Dr. [Jiayi (Jessie) Tong](https://jiayijessietong.github.io/) and Dr. [Elizabeth A. Stuart](https://www.elizabethstuart.org/). 


## Interests

My primary research interests focus on real-world evidence synthesis, causal inference, and federated learning. Specifically, I have developed efficient and lossless distributed algorithms for multivariate longitudinal healthcare data across institutions while preserving patient privacy. 

Beyond methodology, I am passionate about biostatistics education and have served as the lead organizer for the Biostatistics Education & Student Training (BEST) Seminar and the [Johns Hopkins Causal Inference Working Group](https://jhsphcausalinference.weebly.com/).


## Education

**Johns Hopkins University** | Baltimore, MD
Ph.D. in Biostatistics | Aug 2024 - Present

**Duke University** | Durham, NC
M.S. in Statistical Science | Aug 2022 - May 2024  | Advised by Dr. [Hwanhee Hong](http://www.hwanheehong.com/) & Dr. [Alexander Volfovsky](https://volfovsky.github.io/)

**Carleton College** | Northfield, MN
B.A. in Statistics & Political Science | Aug 2018 - June 2022 | Advised by Dr. [Andrew Poppick](https://www.carleton.edu/directory/apoppick/) & Dr. [Greg Marfleet](https://www.carleton.edu/directory/gmarfleet/)


## Honors & Awards

* Teaching Assistant of the Year Award (2024)
* Dean's Research Award for Master's Students (2022 & 2023)
* Phi Beta Kappa Society & Sigma Xi Society (2022)
* Magna Cum Laude (2022)
* Dean's Honor List (Top 10% of Class, 2021)
